column1: If Peter comes to my place, we__________  (to go) to play in the yard.
If Peter__________ (not to come) to my place, I will watch TV.
If Frank’s parents have their holidays in summer, they __________ (to go) to the seaside.
If they __________ (to have) their holidays in winter, they will stay at home.
If the fog thickens, Harold _______ (to put up) the tent for the night.
If I _______ (to finish) my work, I will go to the cinema.
We_______ (to buy) this book if our mother gives us some money.
If we _______ (come) to your place you will show us your present.
I_______ (return) you your ring if you ask me.
I will wait for my friend if he_______ (to go) to the shop.
My father_______ (start) writing if the sun rises.
If you don't finish your study I _______ (not to present) you with a new computer.
